scripts.dev: pnpm agent:codegen && concurrently -n api,agent,web -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --filter @lotto/api dev" "pnpm agent:dev" "pnpm --filter @lotto/web dev"
scripts.agent:codegen: pnpm shared:openapi && pnpm shared:fixtures && uv run --project apps/agent python apps/agent/scripts/generate_models.py
scripts.verify: pnpm agent:codegen && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:coverage && uv run --project apps/agent pytest apps/agent/tests
